destinations.evidence: Parent-state obligation computation structurally replaces FrequencyIndex executable-call selection.
destinations.snippet: compute_obligations scans Scheduler parent state, filters deleted/non-SCHEDULED/invalid timing/executed/fee-ineligible entries, then filter_obligations_by_predicates applies C11.

destinations.evidence: Payload builder submits exactly the filtered Scheduler obligations for the block.
destinations.snippet: current_block = parent + 1; compute_obligations(...); filter_obligations_by_predicates(...); push PayloadCandidate::Scheduled; dedupe included_scheduled_indices.

destinations.evidence: Verifier parity prevents a builder from omitting executable obligations when gas remains.
destinations.snippet: Verifier recomputes the same obligation set and checks fulfilled scheduled call/index pairs.

equivalence_argument: The old FrequencyIndex/SynchronousScheduler surface is gone, but its executable-call semantics are structurally preserved by deriving obligations from Scheduler parent state and sharing the result between builder and verifier.

related_but_insufficient_code: No audited repo contains exact FrequencyIndex symbols; port scheduled-block-building documents replacing old SchedulerServiceState helper.

notes: Mapped structurally; old data structure absent by design.
rationale: The FrequencyIndex candidate is an optimization whose invariant is semantic preservation: optimized executable-call lookup must produce the same submit set as the previous full scan.
statement: After processing block N, SynchronousScheduler must submit exactly the calls returned by state.get_executable_calls(N+1) that still exist in state.calls, preserving the same eligibility semantics as should_execute_at_block iteration without scanning every call.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build scheduler state with multiple frequency patterns, cancelled/missing calls, and nonmatching blocks; compare manual should_execute_at_block results for N+1 with get_executable_calls(N+1) filtered through state.calls and assert identical submitted call IDs.
summary: FrequencyIndex executable-call semantics are structurally preserved through parent-state obligations.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Compare payload builder scheduled candidates against a naive executable set from Scheduler storage with cancelled/deleted/executed/predicate-filtered calls.
title: FrequencyIndex preserves executable-call semantics
